author: etan_status
content: I measure about ~2 seconds on nimbus as well, including the merkleization, on M4 Pro

author: etan_status
content: so, probably doesn't need anything fancy. just start the slot transition ~2 seconds before prior slot end, and it will work out well

author: tbenr
content: Or just swallow a bit of turbulence at first slot. But i believe we have something to squeeze from those numbers

author: etan_status
content: yeah, I mean, the primary source of turblence is the ePBS jank anyway where the entire pending deposit queue has to be BLS verified. if done naively, that takes like 50 seconds
